# PatientFlow

> PatientFlow is patient retention and clinic management software that turns a clinic's existing patient database into predictable monthly revenue. It automates WhatsApp follow-ups, appointment reminders, treatment recalls and reactivation campaigns so clinics grow without increasing ad spend. Built by Crea8iv Media for clinics in Pakistan.

## What it does
- Reactivates inactive patients via automated WhatsApp campaigns
- Sends appointment confirmations, 24-hour and 2-hour reminders, birthday and seasonal campaigns, treatment recalls, review requests, referral and membership renewals
- Manages appointments, patient records, billing/invoices, inventory, staff roles and reporting
- Provides a branded public booking website and patient portal
- Tracks campaign ROI: messages sent, responses, appointments booked and revenue generated

## Who it's for
Clinics that depend on repeat visits: dental, orthodontic, skin, aesthetic, hair transplant, medical, IVF and cosmetic practices. Single location or multi-branch.

## Pricing
- Starter — PKR 25,000/month: appointments, patient records, billing, staff roles, booking website, daily backups. Unlimited staff and patients.
- AppointmentFlow AI — PKR 40,000/month: everything in Starter plus WhatsApp shared inbox, automated reminders, recall/reactivation campaigns, broadcasts, AI receptionist, AI treatment notes and advanced analytics.

## Proof
Example campaign: a 3,500-patient database received an automated WhatsApp summer whitening promotion → 150 responses → 45 booked appointments → PKR 675,000 revenue → 27× ROI on a PKR 25,000 subscription.
